items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the offboarding checklist triggering access revocation. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms whether this scenario was executed or what the results were. The lack of traces or snapshots to audit the coverage further indicates that the requirement cannot be assessed at this time.
